SavedBoards.Name: Saved Boards
SavedBoards.Hint: Internal storage for board snapshots saved through the Loreboard archive. Managed from the board UI.

Notifications.DeluxeOnly: This feature is part of Loreboard Deluxe.
Notifications.EditionClash: Two Loreboard editions are enabled in this world ({a} and {b}). They cannot run together — disable one of them.
